title: Wire tie-off causing bad logic optimization

features.name: tied_off_bit_in_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a concatenation where an upper bit is tied to a constant zero, followed by bit-slice operations on the result

features.name: bit_slice_constant_comparison
features.description: Code should include a bit-slice taken from a concatenation with a tied-off upper bit, compared against a constant value

features.name: compound_bit_slice_condition
features.description: Code should include a compound condition combining two bit-slice comparisons where one slice spans a tied-off bit
